_comment: Copy this file to ~/.agent-workspace/custom-agents.json to register additional CLI agents (Gemini, OpenCode, Grok, aider, anything). No code changes needed: registered agents appear in the agent picker (/api/agents), can be launched from tasks/batch flows, and can be used as review-workflow stages with their own model/effort. VERIFY each command/flag against YOUR installed CLI version before enabling — these entries are documented starting points, not tested guarantees. Set "override": true to replace a built-in (claude/codex).

opencode.name: OpenCode
opencode.description: OpenCode TUI (verify flags: opencode --help; permissions are configured in opencode.json, not CLI flags)

grok.name: Grok CLI
grok.description: SKELETON — fill in from your installed grok CLI's --help (several 'grok cli' projects exist with different flags)
